name: Pasta Fagiole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. While the pasta is cooking, heat olive oil in a large saucepan.
3. Add minced garlic, chopped green peppers, onions, and celery to the saucepan.
4. Sauté the vegetables until they are soft or tender.
5. Stir in the tomato puree with 1 can of water. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
6. Cook on low heat for 30 minutes.
7. Add the cannellini beans and stir gently.
8. Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the bean mixture.
9. Toss everything together well.
Attribution: Pam Ramsey (pamram@bev.net)
